description: Single-nucleus ATAC-seq chromatin accessibility profiles from brains of 5-month-old APP/PS1 mice treated with Bexarotene or Vehicle (n=5 per group). 61353 nuclei profiled across major brain cell types using the 10x Genomics Chromium platform.

RXR ChIP-seq from APP/PS1 mouse brain tissue treated with Bexarotene (n=2) or Vehicle (n=2). Used to validate RXR binding at differentially accessible chromatin regions identified by snATAC-seq. 11957 significant RXR-binding peaks identified.

Single-cell RNA-seq data from APP/PS1 mouse brains treated with Bexarotene or Vehicle (37634 cells after filtering). Originally generated by Saibro-Girardi et al. (2025) and re-analyzed here for cross-modal integration with snATAC-seq and ChIP-seq data.
